requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (SANS IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（SANS IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（SANS IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires in South Africa is assessed against SANS IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the South African adoption of IEC 62471. The standard classifies products into Risk Groups (Exempt, RG1, RG2, RG3) based on blue light hazard and other optical radiation hazards. Products intended for general lighting are typically expected to fall within Exempt or RG1, and higher risk groups may require warnings or restrictions. Photobiological safety is evaluated as part of the SANS/IEC safety conformity supporting the NRCS LOA, since the relevant luminaire/lamp safety standards (SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560) reference or require consideration of IEC 62471. Verify the current SANS IEC 62471 edition and the risk-group requirements applicable to the specific product.
summary.zh: 南非 LED 灯和灯具的光生物安全依据 SANS IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，该标准为 IEC 62471 的南非采标。标准依据蓝光危害及其他光辐射危害将产品划分为危险组别（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。用于通用照明的产品通常应落在豁免或 RG1，更高危险组别可能须加注警示或限制。光生物安全作为支持 NRCS LOA 的 SANS/IEC 安全符合性的一部分进行评估，因为相关灯具/灯安全标准（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）引用或要求考虑 IEC 62471。请核查现行 SANS IEC 62471 版本及适用于具体产品的危险组别要求。
summary.zht: 南非 LED 燈和燈具的光生物安全依據 SANS IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，該標準為 IEC 62471 的南非採標。標準依據藍光危害及其他光輻射危害將產品劃分為危險組別（豁免、RG1、RG2、RG3）。用於通用照明的產品通常應落在豁免或 RG1，更高危險組別可能須加注警示或限制。光生物安全作為支持 NRCS LOA 的 SANS/IEC 安全符合性的一部分進行評估，因為相關燈具/燈安全標準（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）引用或要求考慮 IEC 62471。請核查現行 SANS IEC 62471 版本及適用於具體產品的危險組別要求。

standards_or_laws: SANS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (South African adoption of IEC 62471)
Referenced within SANS IEC 60598 / SANS IEC 62560 safety assessment supporting the NRCS LOA

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), the Chinese adoption of CIE S 009/IEC 62471, which classifies products into the same Exempt/RG1/RG2/RG3 risk groups. For LED products covered by CCC, photobiological safety/blue light hazard is addressed through the GB 7000 series luminaire safety standards and GB/T 20145 testing. Because both China (GB/T 20145) and South Africa (SANS IEC 62471) derive from IEC 62471, the underlying risk-group methodology is closely aligned, but the certification route and accepted laboratories differ.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），即 CIE S 009/IEC 62471 的中国采标，将产品划分为相同的豁免/RG1/RG2/RG3 危险组别。对于 CCC 涵盖的 LED 产品，光生物安全/蓝光危害通过 GB 7000 系列灯具安全标准及 GB/T 20145 检测处理。由于中国（GB/T 20145）和南非（SANS IEC 62471）均源自 IEC 62471，其底层危险组别方法高度一致，但认证路径和被接受的实验室不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），即 CIE S 009/IEC 62471 的中國採標，將產品劃分為相同的豁免/RG1/RG2/RG3 危險組別。對於 CCC 涵蓋的 LED 產品，光生物安全/藍光危害通過 GB 7000 系列燈具安全標準及 GB/T 20145 檢測處理。由於中國（GB/T 20145）和南非（SANS IEC 62471）均源自 IEC 62471，其底層危險組別方法高度一致，但認證路徑和被接受的實驗室不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (China adoption of CIE S 009/IEC 62471)
GB 7000 series — luminaire safety (China); references photobiological safety considerations

gap.en: Both South Africa (SANS IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) derive from IEC 62471, so the risk-group methodology is closely aligned and an IEC 62471-based test campaign can serve both in principle. The gap is procedural: the NRCS LOA relies on SANS/IEC test reports acceptable to the NRCS (typically from a SANAS-accredited or NRCS-accepted lab against the SANS edition in force), and a GB/T 20145 report or CCC certificate is not automatically accepted. The exporter should ensure the photobiological safety assessment is documented to the SANS IEC 62471 edition referenced in the applicable Compulsory Specification, and that any required risk-group marking/warnings follow the South African requirements. Confirm whether explicit RG marking on packaging is required for the product category.
gap.zh: 南非（SANS IEC 62471）和中国（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，因此危险组别方法高度一致，基于 IEC 62471 的检测原则上可同时服务两地。差距在于程序：NRCS LOA 依赖 NRCS 可接受的 SANS/IEC 检测报告（通常来自 SANAS 认可或 NRCS 接受的实验室，针对现行 SANS 版本），GB/T 20145 报告或 CCC 证书不会被自动接受。出口商应确保光生物安全评估按适用强制性规范所引用的 SANS IEC 62471 版本记录，并确保任何所需的危险组别标识/警示遵循南非要求。请确认该产品类别是否要求在包装上明确标注危险组别。
gap.zht: 南非（SANS IEC 62471）和中國（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，因此危險組別方法高度一致，基於 IEC 62471 的檢測原則上可同時服務兩地。差距在於程序：NRCS LOA 依賴 NRCS 可接受的 SANS/IEC 檢測報告（通常來自 SANAS 認可或 NRCS 接受的實驗室，針對現行 SANS 版本），GB/T 20145 報告或 CCC 證書不會被自動接受。出口商應確保光生物安全評估按適用強制性規範所引用的 SANS IEC 62471 版本記錄，並確保任何所需的危險組別標識/警示遵循南非要求。請確認該產品類別是否要求在包裝上明確標註危險組別。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within safety assessment) — photobiological safety to SANS IEC 62471 forms part of the SANS/IEC safety conformity supporting the NRCS LOA; verify the current edition and any risk-group marking requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within CCC scope) — photobiological safety to GB/T 20145 assessed as part of luminaire safety conformity for in-scope CCC products

source.publisher: South African Bureau of Standards (SABS) / SANS catalogue

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological (blue light hazard) safety in South Africa is assessed to SANS IEC 62471, technically aligned with China's GB/T 20145 (both derive from IEC 62471). The risk-group methodology is shared, but the conformity route differs — the NRCS requires SANS/IEC test reports it accepts, and a CCC/GB report is not automatically recognised. Document the assessment to the SANS IEC 62471 edition in force and confirm any risk-group marking requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非的光生物（蓝光危害）安全依据 SANS IEC 62471 评估，与中国 GB/T 20145 技术一致（两者均源自 IEC 62471）。危险组别方法共通，但符合性路径不同——NRCS 要求其接受的 SANS/IEC 检测报告，CCC/GB 报告不会被自动认可。请按现行 SANS IEC 62471 版本记录评估，并确认任何危险组别标识要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非的光生物（藍光危害）安全依據 SANS IEC 62471 評估，與中國 GB/T 20145 技術一致（兩者均源自 IEC 62471）。危險組別方法共通，但符合性路徑不同——NRCS 要求其接受的 SANS/IEC 檢測報告，CCC/GB 報告不會被自動認可。請按現行 SANS IEC 62471 版本記錄評估，並確認任何危險組別標識要求。

requirement_topic.en: Optical Radiation Marking, Warnings and Product Information
requirement_topic.zh: 光辐射标识、警示及产品信息
requirement_topic.zht: 光輻射標識、警示及產品信息

summary.en: Beyond the SANS IEC 62471 risk-group classification, LED luminaires placed on the South African market are expected to carry the product markings, warnings and information required by the applicable SANS/IEC luminaire and lamp standards (SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560). Where a product exceeds the Exempt/RG1 thresholds, risk-group-specific warnings and viewing-distance information may be required, and general safety markings (rated voltage, wattage, IP rating, manufacturer/importer identification, model) must be legible and durable. Product markings and accompanying information should be in a form acceptable for the South African market (English is the principal commercial language; importer details are required for traceability). Verify the exact marking and information requirements in the SANS/IEC editions referenced by the Compulsory Specification.
summary.zh: 除 SANS IEC 62471 危险组别分类外，投放南非市场的 LED 灯具应带有适用 SANS/IEC 灯具和灯标准（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）所要求的产品标识、警示及信息。当产品超过豁免/RG1 阈值时，可能须加注危险组别专属警示及观看距离信息；一般安全标识（额定电压、功率、IP 等级、制造商/进口商标识、型号）须清晰耐久。产品标识及随附信息应以南非市场可接受的形式呈现（英语为主要商业语言；须提供进口商信息以便追溯）。请核查强制性规范所引用 SANS/IEC 版本中确切的标识和信息要求。
summary.zht: 除 SANS IEC 62471 危險組別分類外，投放南非市場的 LED 燈具應帶有適用 SANS/IEC 燈具和燈標準（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560）所要求的產品標識、警示及信息。當產品超過豁免/RG1 閾值時，可能須加注危險組別專屬警示及觀看距離信息；一般安全標識（額定電壓、功率、IP 等級、製造商/進口商標識、型號）須清晰耐久。產品標識及隨附信息應以南非市場可接受的形式呈現（英語為主要商業語言；須提供進口商信息以便追溯）。請核查強制性規範所引用 SANS/IEC 版本中確切的標識和信息要求。

standards_or_laws: SANS IEC 60598 series — Luminaires (marking and information requirements)
SANS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services (marking requirements)

summary.en: China requires product markings and information under the GB 7000 series (luminaires) and GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 (self-ballasted LED lamps), including rated voltage, power, manufacturer details, model, and CCC mark for in-scope products. Markings and accompanying documentation are in Chinese. Photobiological warnings, where applicable, follow GB/T 20145. The Chinese marking set (including the CCC mark and Chinese-language information) differs from the South African requirements, and importer identification specific to South Africa is not part of the CN marking.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 7000 系列（灯具）及 GB 24906/GB/T 24908（自镇流 LED 灯）要求产品标识和信息，包括额定电压、功率、制造商信息、型号，以及适用产品的 CCC 标志。标识及随附文件为中文。适用情况下的光生物警示遵循 GB/T 20145。中国标识体系（包括 CCC 标志和中文信息）不同于南非要求，且南非专属的进口商标识不属于中国标识内容。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 7000 系列（燈具）及 GB 24906/GB/T 24908（自鎮流 LED 燈）要求產品標識和信息，包括額定電壓、功率、製造商信息、型號，以及適用產品的 CCC 標誌。標識及隨附文件為中文。適用情況下的光生物警示遵循 GB/T 20145。中國標識體系（包括 CCC 標誌和中文信息）不同於南非要求，且南非專屬的進口商標識不屬於中國標識內容。

standards_or_laws: GB 7000 series — Luminaires (China marking and information requirements)
GB 24906 / GB/T 24908 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting (China)

gap.en: Although the marking content (voltage, power, IP rating, model, photobiological warnings) is broadly similar in concept between China and South Africa, the specific marking set differs: the South African market expects English-language information, importer identification for traceability, markings to the SANS/IEC editions referenced by the Compulsory Specification, and (where relevant) the SANS 941 energy label — not the CCC mark or Chinese-language-only information. A Chinese exporter must re-do product/packaging artwork and labelling for South Africa: substitute the CCC mark and Chinese text with South Africa-acceptable markings, add importer details, include any required SANS IEC 62471 risk-group warnings, and add the SANS 941 energy label where in scope. Confirm exact marking, language, and importer-information requirements against the SANS editions and NRCS guidance in force.
gap.zh: 尽管标识内容（电压、功率、IP 等级、型号、光生物警示）在中国和南非概念上大致相似，但具体标识体系不同：南非市场要求英文信息、用于追溯的进口商标识、依强制性规范所引用 SANS/IEC 版本的标识，以及（适用时）SANS 941 能效标签——而非 CCC 标志或仅中文信息。中国出口商须为南非重做产品/包装图样和标签：以南非可接受的标识替换 CCC 标志和中文文本，添加进口商信息，纳入任何所需的 SANS IEC 62471 危险组别警示，并在适用范围内添加 SANS 941 能效标签。请对照现行 SANS 版本和 NRCS 指引确认确切的标识、语言和进口商信息要求。
gap.zht: 儘管標識內容（電壓、功率、IP 等級、型號、光生物警示）在中國和南非概念上大致相似，但具體標識體系不同：南非市場要求英文信息、用於追溯的進口商標識、依強制性規範所引用 SANS/IEC 版本的標識，以及（適用時）SANS 941 能效標籤——而非 CCC 標誌或僅中文信息。中國出口商須為南非重做產品/包裝圖樣和標籤：以南非可接受的標識替換 CCC 標誌和中文文本，添加進口商信息，納入任何所需的 SANS IEC 62471 危險組別警示，並在適用範圍內添加 SANS 941 能效標籤。請對照現行 SANS 版本和 NRCS 指引確認確切的標識、語言和進口商信息要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (within safety conformity) — product markings, warnings and information per the SANS/IEC luminaire and lamp standards referenced by the Compulsory Specification; English information and importer identification expected for the South African market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — product markings under GB 7000 / GB 24906 series including CCC mark and Chinese-language information for in-scope products

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Africa requires product markings, warnings and information to the SANS/IEC luminaire and lamp standards (SANS IEC 60598, SANS IEC 62560), with English information and importer identification expected, plus any SANS IEC 62471 risk-group warnings and the SANS 941 energy label where in scope. Chinese GB markings and the CCC mark do not satisfy this — re-do product/packaging labelling for the South African market. Verify exact requirements against the SANS editions and NRCS guidance in force.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非要求产品标识、警示及信息符合 SANS/IEC 灯具和灯标准（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560），并须有英文信息和进口商标识，以及任何 SANS IEC 62471 危险组别警示和适用范围内的 SANS 941 能效标签。中国 GB 标识和 CCC 标志不满足此要求——须为南非市场重做产品/包装标签。请对照现行 SANS 版本和 NRCS 指引核查确切要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非要求產品標識、警示及信息符合 SANS/IEC 燈具和燈標準（SANS IEC 60598、SANS IEC 62560），並須有英文信息和進口商標識，以及任何 SANS IEC 62471 危險組別警示和適用範圍內的 SANS 941 能效標籤。中國 GB 標識和 CCC 標誌不滿足此要求——須為南非市場重做產品/包裝標籤。請對照現行 SANS 版本和 NRCS 指引核查確切要求。
